Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, and columns in your workspace, then surfaces backed governance context such as domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary terms, workflow state, lineage, and quality evidence when those signals are available. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects visible metadata completeness for fields such as description, owner, domain, sensitivity, tier, criticality, and data product. Quality evidence is shown separately when a backed quality source reports it. Who sees what On-behalf-o

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › entrada-prod ⌘K UC connected · 95.5% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, and columns in your workspace, then surfaces backed governance context such as domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary terms, workflow state, lineage, and quality evidence when those signals are available. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects visible metadata completeness for fields such as description, owner, domain, sensitivity, tier, criticality, and data product. Quality evidence is shown separately when a backed quality source reports it. Who sees what On-behalf-o
